data.title: Indiana Resources Announces Director’s Interest Change
data.description:
Indiana Resources Limited ( (AU:IDA) ) has shared an announcement.

Indiana Resources Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest, with Bronwyn Barnes acquiring 2,555,314 fully paid ordinary shares and disposing of 550,000 shares through on-market trades. This change reflects a strategic adjustment in the director’s investment portfolio, potentially impacting the company’s market perception and investor confidence.

More about Indiana Resources Limited

Indiana Resources Limited operates in the resources sector, focusing on exploration and development of mineral properties. The company is engaged in identifying and developing mineral resource projects, with a particular emphasis on gold and other valuable minerals.

data.title: Bifire S.p.A. Announces Upcoming Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Bifire S.p.A. ( (IT:FIRE) ) has provided an announcement.

Bifire S.p.A. has announced the publication of the notice for its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting, scheduled for April 29, 2025, with a potential second call on April 30, 2025. The meeting will address the approval of financial statements, allocation of operating results, and appointments to the Board of Directors and the Board of Statutory Auditors. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it will determine key governance and financial decisions impacting the company’s future operations and strategic direction.

More about Bifire S.p.A.

BIFIRE® is a company active in the production of materials for fire protection and thermal insulation in the construction and industrial sectors. Its products are primarily used in building renovations, particularly with ‘dry’ construction techniques, which offer reduced construction times and costs, improved environmental sustainability, and efficient project execution.

data.title: Brookside Energy Schedules Annual General Meeting for May 2025
data.description:
Brookside Energy ( (AU:BRK) ) has issued an update.

Brookside Energy Limited has announced its Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 29, 2025, at Nexia Perth. Shareholders are encouraged to participate either in person or by proxy, with voting details and procedures outlined in accordance with the Corporations Act 2001. The meeting is crucial as it impacts shareholder interests and company resolutions, with the Chair intending to vote all undirected proxies in favor of all resolutions.

data.title: Standard Chartered Executes Share Buy-Back to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has issued an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC has announced the purchase of 1,601,861 of its ordinary shares as part of a share buy-back program. This initiative, executed through J.P. Morgan Securities plc, is part of a broader strategy to optimize the company’s capital structure. The purchased shares will be canceled, reducing the total number of shares in issue to 2,376,496,640, which will also be the total number of voting rights. This move is expected to enhance shareholder value and reflects the company’s confidence in its financial stability and future prospects.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a prominent financial services company incorporated in England and Wales. It operates primarily in the banking industry, offering a wide range of financial products and services. The company is known for its focus on emerging markets, providing services such as personal banking, corporate banking, and wealth management.

YTD Price Performance: -1.09%

Average Trading Volume: 7,112

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $27.01B

data.title: Yotai Refractories Supports Tender Offer by ASNF HOLDINGS
data.description:
Yotai Refractories Co., Ltd. ( (JP:5357) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Yotai Refractories Co., Ltd. has announced its support for a tender offer by ASNF HOLDINGS GK for its common shares, while leaving the decision to tender shares to individual shareholders. The tender offer aims to acquire shares from major shareholders, including UGS Asset Management and Sumitomo Osaka Cement, without delisting the company from the Tokyo Stock Exchange, potentially impacting the company’s shareholder structure and market positioning.

More about Yotai Refractories Co., Ltd.

Yotai Refractories Co., Ltd. operates in the refractories industry, focusing on the production and distribution of materials that can withstand high temperatures, primarily serving industries such as steel, cement, and glass manufacturing.

data.title: Lemon Tree Hotels Confirms Compliance with SEBI Regulations for Q1 2025
data.description:
Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd. ( (IN:LEMONTREE) ) has issued an announcement.

Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd. has submitted a certificate to the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE Limited, confirming compliance with Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. This announcement indicates the company’s adherence to regulatory requirements concerning the dematerialization of securities, ensuring that the securities are properly listed and managed, which is crucial for maintaining investor confidence and operational transparency.

More about Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd.

Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd. operates in the hospitality industry, offering a range of hotel services primarily focused on mid-priced and economy segments. The company is known for its presence in key business and leisure destinations across India.

data.title: Grupo Ezentis Announces 2025 Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description:
GRUPO EZENTIS S.A ( (ES:EZE) ) has issued an announcement.

Grupo Ezentis, S.A. has announced the convening of its Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for May 13, 2025, with a second call on May 14, 2025, if necessary. The meeting will address key agenda items including the examination and approval of the annual accounts for the fiscal year 2024, re-election of board members, and the appointment of a new director. Shareholders have the option to participate physically, telematically, or through remote voting, reflecting the company’s commitment to inclusive shareholder engagement.

data.title: Ringer Hut Announces Executive Personnel Changes to Strengthen Leadership
data.description:
Ringer Hut Co., Ltd. ( (JP:8200) ) has shared an announcement.

Ringer Hut Co., Ltd. has announced a proposal for changes in its executive personnel, with the reappointment of several directors and the introduction of new members to its board. This strategic move, based on recommendations from the Naming and Compensation Committee, aims to enhance corporate value and strengthen the board’s supervisory function, particularly with the inclusion of Eri Abe, who brings extensive experience from the airline industry.

More about Ringer Hut Co., Ltd.

Ringer Hut Co., Ltd. operates in the food service industry, primarily focusing on Japanese cuisine. The company is known for its chain of restaurants offering Nagasaki Champon and other regional dishes, with a market focus on expanding its presence both domestically and internationally.

data.title: Rorze Corporation Reports Strong Financial Growth and Strategic Expansion
data.description:
Rorze Corporation ( (JP:6323) ) has shared an announcement.

Rorze Corporation reported a significant increase in its consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ended February 28, 2025, with net sales rising by 33.4% and operating profit increasing by 32.7% compared to the previous year. The company also announced a stock split and included two new companies in its consolidation scope, which could enhance its market position and operational capabilities.

More about Rorze Corporation

Rorze Corporation operates in the technology sector, focusing on the development and manufacturing of automation equipment. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is known for its innovative solutions in the automation industry, catering to a global market.
